description: Mladen Mitrovic, owner of Speed & Sport at the time, took help from the University of Munich and the first CAD software to produce his dream supercar in record time, taking inspiration from the Mercedes C111. The result was an incredibly modern for its time sports car, powered by a Chevy 350, and utilising a tubular chassis made of kevlar, carbon fiber and epoxy, ensuring rigidity and light weight.
creator: Johnny
